name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations. Fast funding available for qualified borrowers.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating multiple physical store locations across the United States. The company positions itself as a provider of quick cash solutions for consumers facing immediate financial needs. Founded to serve customers who need rapid access to funds, ACE operates a network of brick-and-mortar locations where customers can apply in person.

ACE Cash Express offers a diverse portfolio of financial products including installment loans, title loans (vehicle-backed loans), check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax services, and business services. They advertise online loan options and maintain a store locator system indicating significant geographic presence. Their service menu suggests they target consumers across multiple financial situations, from those needing immediate cash to those seeking ongoing financial management tools.

The company distinguishes itself through its physical store presence combined with online loan offerings, attempting to bridge traditional and digital lending channels. They maintain dedicated customer service phone lines and email support specifically for different service types (general inquiries versus online loan operations). The website references state-specific loan availability, indicating compliance-driven operations and state-by-state regulation management.

A significant limitation is that the provided website URLs return 404 errors, preventing verification of current specific terms, rates, and detailed service offerings. The website content accessed is primarily navigation elements and error pages rather than substantive product information. This restricts ability to verify specific APRs, loan amounts, processing times, or eligibility requirements directly from their current digital presence.
pros: Multiple service options including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, and money transfers in one location
Online loan application option available in addition to in-store applications
Dedicated customer service phone lines for different needs: (877) ACE-CASH for general inquiries and (866) ACE-CASH for online loans
Widespread physical store network with store locator functionality for convenient access
Offers bill payment and money transfer services beyond just loans
Provides tax services through their locations
Maintains compliance infrastructure with state-specific disclosures (California Notice at Collection referenced)
cons: Website contains multiple broken links (404 errors) making current product terms and rates inaccessible
State availability limitations explicitly noted ('this type of loan is not available in this state'), requiring verification for each location
Emergency cash products like title loans and small installment loans typically carry high APRs (not disclosed on accessible pages)
Physical store dependency means customers must visit in person for many services, reducing accessibility for some
Limited transparency on current rates, fees, and exact loan terms from publicly accessible website content
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to visit a physical location with flexible same-day funding options
People with vehicles who can use title as collateral for larger emergency loan amounts
Unbanked or underbanked consumers seeking check cashing and money transfer services alongside credit products
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in physical proximity to their store locations who need rapid emergency funding and can provide collateral (vehicle title) or qualify for installment loans. Primary caveat: this is high-cost emergency lending; verify current APRs and terms are acceptable before applying, as title loans and small emergency loans typically carry rates significantly above traditional lending.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
